summary: Small cleanup and matching fixes for the menu sound and sound test sources. The PR made several file-local globals static, corrected symbol/split sizes for mnSound data/sdata/sbss/bss ranges, adjusted function prototypes to use the actual HSD_GObj* callback-style parameter shape, and fixed a sound-test argument type from s8 to u8. Evidence is limited to the diff excerpt; there was no substantive review-comment excerpt.
what_changed: In config/GALE01/splits.txt, narrowed mnSound section extents: .data end changed from 0x803EEFD8 to 0x803EEFD1, .sdata end from 0x804D5018 to 0x804D5015, and .sbss end from 0x804D6C38 to 0x804D6C34.

In config/GALE01/symbols.txt, corrected mnSound string object sizes: mnSound_803EEF90 from 0x1E to 0x1F, mnSound_803EEFB0 from 0x20 to 0x21, mnSound_804D5008 from 0x8 to 0x7, and mnSound_804D5010 from 0x8 to 0x5.
Collapsed mnSound bss symbols by replacing separate mnSound_804A08A8 size 0x4 and mnSound_804A08AC size 0xC entries with one mnSound_804A08A8 object of size 0x10.
Reduced mnSound_804D6C30 sbss symbol size from 0x8 to 0x4.
In mnsound.c, made the StaticModelDesc storage file-local and tied it to mnSound_804A08A8 instead of a separate global mnSound_desc name.
In mnsound.c, made mnSound_804D6C30 a static HSD_GObj*.
Changed mnSound_80249C08 from taking no arguments to taking an unused HSD_GObj* parameter, and changed mnSound_8024A09C from taking s32 to HSD_GObj*.
Updated mnSound_8024A09C to load archive sections into mnSound_804A08A8 fields and to call mnSound_80249C08(arg0).
In mnsoundtest.c, made mnSoundTest_804D6C40, mnSoundTest_804D6C44, mnSoundTest_804D6C48, and mnSoundTest_804D6C4C static file-local variables, with declarations consolidated near the top.
In mnsoundtest.c and mnsoundtest.h, changed mnSoundTest_8024AD58 second parameter type from s8 to u8.
In mnsoundtest.c, reordered two local f32 declarations in mnSoundTest_8024ABF8 and removed an explicit float cast in HSD_JObjReqAnimAll(sp18, temp_r0).
smart_moves: Kept config symbol sizes and splits in sync with the C storage changes, preventing stale object boundaries around mnSound from polluting neighboring menu objects like mnDeflicker and mnLanguage.
Used static file-local linkage for menu globals that appear only to be used within mnsound.c or mnsoundtest.c, matching decomp storage intent while reducing exported-symbol noise.

Represented the 0x10-byte mnSound_804A08A8 storage as a single StaticModelDesc object instead of two artificial bss objects, which better matches the archive-loading code that fills joint, animjoint, matanim_joint, and shapeanim_joint fields.
Adjusted callback-like menu functions to accept HSD_GObj* rather than s32 or no argument, preserving call-shape compatibility while marking the parameter unused where appropriate.
Changed mnSoundTest_8024AD58's flag-like argument to u8 consistently in both implementation and header, avoiding signedness mismatches across declarations.
decomp_lessons: When a decompiled object is actually a struct, prefer declaring the full typed static object over splitting the same storage into address-named fragments; then update symbols.txt bss sizes accordingly.

For menu code that is registered or called through HSD_GObj procedures, verify the callback signature against call sites and proc-registration patterns; a matching-looking no-arg function may still need an unused HSD_GObj* parameter.
Header prototypes must be updated together with implementation signedness changes, especially for small integer parameters like u8 versus s8 that affect matching and ABI expectations.
String symbol sizes in symbols.txt should include the correct terminator/padding-derived extent; off-by-one string sizes can shift section boundaries and create false neighboring symbols.
If changing C linkage to static, check the corresponding config entries and split extents so the map representation continues to match the source-level storage model.

Small declaration-order or cast changes, such as f32 local ordering or removing an unnecessary cast to f32, may be matching-sensitive in this codebase and should be preserved when evidence supports them.
naming_conventions: Address-derived names remained for unknown menu globals and functions, such as mnSound_804A08A8, mnSound_804D6C30, mnSound_80249C08, mnSound_8024A09C, and mnSoundTest_8024AD58.

The previous descriptive global name mnSound_desc was removed in favor of the address-based symbol mnSound_804A08A8, likely because the config symbol identity and storage address mattered more than the inferred description name.
File-local unknown globals were declared as static while retaining their address-derived names, e.g. static HSD_GObj* mnSoundTest_804D6C40 and static s32 mnSoundTest_804D6C48.
Menu module prefixes stayed consistent: mnSound_ for the sound menu, mnSoundTest_ for the sound test menu, and mnDeflicker_/mnVibration_ neighboring symbols in config.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed function signatures to match callback ABI shape: mnSound_80249C08(HSD_GObj* unused) and mnSound_8024A09C(HSD_GObj* arg0).
Removed an explicit `(f32)` cast in `HSD_JObjReqAnimAll(sp18, temp_r0)`, suggesting the cast affected generated code or was unnecessary for matching.
Reordered local f32 declarations in mnSoundTest_8024ABF8 from temp_f30 before temp_f31 to temp_f31 before temp_f30, likely for stack/register allocation matching.
Changed mnSoundTest_8024AD58's second parameter from signed s8 to unsigned u8, consistent with boolean/flag use via `temp_r0 = !!arg1`.
Mapped archive-loaded model descriptor fields directly through `mnSound_804A08A8.joint`, `.animjoint`, `.matanim_joint`, and `.shapeanim_joint`, supporting a struct-sized bss symbol match.
review_feedback: No review comments were present in the provided PR context.
The PR had one issue comment according to counts, but no human text excerpt was provided, so reviewer or author rationale cannot be extracted.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that rename mnSound_804A08A8 or type StaticModelDesc objects in other mn menu files.
Check whether mnSound_80249C08 and mnSound_8024A09C are registered as HSD_GObj callbacks elsewhere and whether their prototypes stayed HSD_GObj*.
Search for other menu modules with split bss symbols that should be collapsed into a StaticModelDesc-sized object.
Audit adjacent mnSound string symbols in symbols.txt for correct null-terminated sizes and split boundaries.
Look for similar s8-to-u8 fixes in sound test or menu flag parameters.
